_meta.description: Curated legendary recipe components + per-legendary references. Recipes are intentionally one-level-deep (the curator decides which sub-gifts to expand into leaves vs. leave as 'specific work'). Item IDs sourced from https://wiki.guildwars2.com/ and https://api.guildwars2.com/v2/items?ids=... — items with uncertain IDs are marked in `notes` and should be verified against the live API. Add new legendaries by referencing existing components + adding the precursor + signature high-value ingredients as direct leaves.
_meta.verification_method: GET /v2/items?ids=<csv>&lang=en — compare returned name to the leaf name field
_meta.scope_note: First iteration ships 3 shared components + 5 sample legendaries (Bolt, Howler, Astralaria, Aurora, Ad Infinitum). Extend by adding components and listing them under additional legendaries.

gift_of_fortune.name: Gift of Fortune
gift_of_fortune.description: Required by every Gen 1 legendary weapon. Mystic Forge: Gift of Magic + Gift of Might + 77 Mystic Clovers + 250 Glob of Ectoplasm. The leaves below flatten Gift of Magic/Might into their raw mats since players track those directly.

gift_of_mastery.name: Gift of Mastery
gift_of_mastery.description: Required by every Gen 1 legendary weapon. Mystic Forge: Bloodstone Shard + Gift of Battle + Gift of Exploration + Gift of Maguuma Mastery / Tyrian / etc (varies by gen). Listing only the universal four; the gen-specific mastery gift is curated per-legendary if needed.

leaves.name: Bloodstone Shard
leaves.notes: 200 Spirit Shards from Miyani — id TBV

mystic_tribute.name: Mystic Tribute (Gen 2)
mystic_tribute.description: Gen 2 / Gen 2.5 equivalent of Gift of Fortune for many recipes. Mystic Forge: 2× Bloodstone Shard + 250 Mystic Coin + 250 Glob of Ectoplasm + 77 Mystic Clovers.

legendaries.notes: Gen 1 sword. Specific gift 'Gift of Quickness' not modelled: it needs 100 Charged Lodestone + 250 Vial of Powerful Blood + Vision Crystal + 100 Charged Cores. Add as a 'gift_of_quickness' component if you want it tracked.
Gen 1 warhorn. One of the cheapest Gen 1s — precursor is craftable. Specific gift uses Onyx + Glacial Lodestones.

leaves.name: The Lover (Astralaria Precursor)
leaves.notes: id TBV; account-bound precursor, but the legacy item id still works for owned-count

legendaries.notes: Gen 2 axe. Real recipe also wants Gift of Astralaria + Gift of Maguuma Mastery — not modelled here.

leaves.name: Unbound Magic
leaves.notes: Living World season 3 currency; id TBV

leaves.name: Glob of Ectoplasm
leaves.notes: Used across multiple Aurora steps — placeholder aggregate

leaves.name: Mystic Coin
leaves.notes: Used across multiple Aurora steps — placeholder aggregate

legendaries.notes: Trinket made purely through the collection achievement (no Mystic Forge final step). Real progress lives in the collection bits — the leaves listed here are a low-fidelity approximation of total spend across the 24 collection steps.

Ad Infinitum Tier 1 (Fractal back). Most cost lives in Fractal Relics, ascended materials, and the collection achievement itself. Add stabilising matrices / fractal weapon drops if you want finer-grained tracking.
